tests.scenario: Verify that the app launches within 3 seconds
steps: Launch the Headspace app
Measure the time taken to display the home screen
Verify the home screen is displayed
tests.expected_result: The system should display the home screen within 3 seconds

tests.scenario: Verify that the app remains stable for 30 minutes
steps: Launch the Headspace app
Use the app continuously for 30 minutes
Verify the app does not crash or freeze
tests.expected_result: The system should not crash or freeze for at least 30 minutes

tests.scenario: Verify that downloaded content is accessible offline for 30 days
steps: Download content on a device with a stable internet connection
Disable internet connection on the device
Access the downloaded content after 30 days
Verify the content plays without error
tests.expected_result: The system should allow access to downloaded content offline for at least 30 days

tests.scenario: Verify that downloaded content plays without error on a device without internet
steps: Download content on a device with a stable internet connection
Disable internet connection on the device
Access the downloaded content
Verify the content plays without error
tests.expected_result: The system should play downloaded content without error on a device without internet

tests.scenario: Verify that the app displays a clear and accurate list of subscription options
steps: Navigate to the settings menu
View the subscription options
Verify the list includes at least 3 options with clear pricing and features
tests.expected_result: The system should display a clear and accurate list of subscription options

tests.scenario: Verify that the updated plan is reflected in the settings menu within 1 minute
steps: Navigate to the settings menu
Change the subscription plan
Verify the updated plan is reflected in the settings menu within 1 minute
tests.expected_result: The system should reflect the updated plan in the settings menu within 1 minute

tests.scenario: Verify that the subscription is canceled within 2 minutes
steps: Initiate the cancellation process
Confirm cancellation
Verify the subscription is canceled within 2 minutes
tests.expected_result: The system should cancel the subscription within 2 minutes

tests.scenario: Verify that the user receives a confirmation email within 5 minutes
steps: Initiate the cancellation process
Confirm cancellation
Verify a confirmation email is received within 5 minutes
tests.expected_result: The system should send a confirmation email within 5 minutes

tests.scenario: Verify that the app displays a clear and organized list of completed sessions
steps: Complete at least 5 sessions
View the progress screen
Verify the list of completed sessions is clear and organized
tests.expected_result: The system should display a clear and organized list of completed sessions

tests.scenario: Verify that the app accurately reflects session details
steps: Complete a session
View the history screen
Verify the session details, including date and duration, are accurate
tests.expected_result: The system should accurately reflect session details

tests.scenario: Verify that haptic feedback is provided during sessions
steps: Navigate to the settings menu
Enable haptic feedback
Start a session
Verify haptic feedback is provided during the session
tests.expected_result: The system should provide haptic feedback during sessions

tests.scenario: Verify that continuous playback works as expected
steps: Navigate to the settings menu
Enable continuous playback
Start a session
Verify the next session plays automatically without interruption
tests.expected_result: The system should play the next session automatically without interruption

tests.scenario: Verify that relevant content is displayed within 2 clicks
steps: Navigate to the app's main menu
Search for a specific type of meditation
Verify relevant results are displayed within 2 clicks
tests.expected_result: The system should display relevant results within 2 clicks

tests.scenario: Verify that session details are displayed within 1 click
steps: Navigate to the app's main menu
Use the search function to find a specific session
Verify session details are displayed within 1 click
tests.expected_result: The system should display session details within 1 click

tests.scenario: Verify that personally identifiable information is not collected without consent
steps: Initiate the app for the first time
Verify the system prompts for data collection consent
Verify personally identifiable information is not collected without explicit consent
tests.expected_result: The system should not collect personally identifiable information without explicit consent

tests.scenario: Verify that collected data is displayed accurately
steps: Provide consent for data collection
View account settings
Verify the system displays a clear and accurate list of collected data
tests.expected_result: The system should display a clear and accurate list of collected data

tests.scenario: Verify that data encryption methods are displayed accurately
steps: Provide consent for data collection
View account settings
Verify the system displays a clear and accurate list of data encryption methods used
tests.expected_result: The system should display a clear and accurate list of data encryption methods used

tests.scenario: Verify that ads are not targeted based on user data
steps: Use the app and encounter an ad
Verify the ad is not targeted based on user data
tests.expected_result: The system should not display targeted ads based on user data

tests.scenario: Verify that the refund policy is displayed clearly
steps: Make a purchase
Request a refund
Verify the system provides a clear and accurate refund policy within 1 click
tests.expected_result: The system should provide a clear and accurate refund policy within 1 click

tests.scenario: Verify that refunds are processed within 5 business days
steps: Make a purchase
Request a refund
Verify the refund is processed within 5 business days
tests.expected_result: The system should process refunds within 5 business days
